name: Activity-to-Outcome Correlation
description: Compare activity patterns on closed-won vs closed-lost deals to surface which behaviors actually move pipeline. Replaces received-wisdom playbooks with data-grounded correlation analysis. "This isn't actually working" findings are surfaced explicitly.
alsoSurfaces: Which activity patterns correlate with winning deals on our data?
Which playbook prescriptions don't actually correlate with outcomes?
Which activities show statistically significant effect sizes?
What playbook adjustments are grounded in our own data?
beforeWeRun: Time window: trailing 12 months of closed deals, or custom?
Deal segments: all closed deals above $10K, or specific tier/segment?
Comparison method: won vs lost with control for size/segment, or raw?

whatYoullGet.name: Situation
whatYoullGet.desc: Window, deal volume, methodology summary, statistical confidence baseline.

whatYoullGet.name: Correlation findings
whatYoullGet.desc: Markdown table: activity dimensions × won-median, lost-median, difference, significance, effect size, classification. Sorted by effect size.

whatYoullGet.name: Weak correlations
whatYoullGet.desc: Two paragraphs naming activity types in the playbook (or sales wisdom) that don't show meaningful correlation with winning.

whatYoullGet.name: Recommended playbook adjustments
whatYoullGet.desc: 3–5 specific recommendations grounded in findings, with concrete numbers.

whatYoullGet.name: Sources & methodology
whatYoullGet.desc: Statistical tests applied, sample sizes, control variables, period boundaries, sources read.

callout: 5 quick inputs, then Sage drafts your correlation memo in ~14 min.
